item.title: Join #TeamTrellix at RSAC 2023
item.description: We can’t wait to join our customers, partners and peers in San Francisco this April 24-27, and will be showing off #TeamTrellix at the show and online. For the latest information and announcements surrounding RSAC 2023, be sure to follow @Trellix and @RSAConference, and our event site here.

item.title: What International Women's Day Means to Me
item.description: Trellix Chief Product Officer Aparna Rayasam shares what IWD means to her, both as a female leader in the cybersecurity industry and mother of two daughters.

item.title: Trellix Email Security Recognized Among Notable Enterprise Email Security Vendors
item.description: I'm delighted of course that Trellix Email Security has been recognized among Notable Vendors in The Enterprise Email Security Landscape, Q1 2023

item.title: Celebrating Black History
item.description: Every February for more than 40 years, we’ve celebrated Black History Month in the United States and Canada, a celebration that for many of our European counterparts happens in October.

item.title: ChatGPT: A future friend or foe?
item.description: ChatGPT is an AI-powered chatbot that uses natural language processing. It has the potential for malicious activities but can also possibly be used for cybersecurity. This blog post explores both the bad and the good and how customers can currently protect themselves using Trellix email security and cyber threat intelligence.

item.title: New Trellix Xtend Global Partner Program Accelerates Business Growth and Customer Resilience
item.description: Join the new Trellix Xtend Global Partner Program to increase profitability through leading XDR solutions that are designed to better protect customers.

item.title: An Era of Geopolitical Instability and Economic Uncertainty a Perfect Storm for Cyber Criminals
item.description: The return of war in Europe has also served as a wake-up call for those questioning the EU’s approach to security and defense and its ability to defend its interests, particularly in cyberspace.

item.title: The 2022 Media Guide to Busting Election Security Myths
item.description: This latest in Trellix’s series of 2022 Election Security blogs seeks to put guidance from government officials in simple terms to help media spot, question and bust eight election security myths with the potential to emerge in the coming critical weeks leading up to and after November’s midterm elections.

item.title: What to expect at Trellix Xpand Live 2022
item.description: Join #TeamTrellix for the first-ever Trellix Xpand Live September 27-29, at the Aria Hotel in Las Vegas, where the world’s largest network of cybersecurity experts will unite in our shared mission: To power a resilient, thriving world!

item.title: First Look into Trellix’s Inaugural Xpand Partner Summit
item.description: Join Trellix at Xpand - First look into Trellix’s inaugural Xpand Partner Summit

item.title: Trellix Welcomes Karan Sondhi as Public Sector CTO, And More
item.description: This week, Trellix announced that Karan Sondhi will be joining us as Chief Technology Officer for Public Sector. In this role, he will define and lead the implementation of the company’s public sector technology strategy.

item.title: Soulful Automation: Maximizing Machine Learning for Efficiency and a Higher Purpose
item.description: Cybersecurity faces a talent desert amid grave cyberthreats. Machine Learning and Automation can help, and so will open frameworks for industry collaboration.

item.title: Recognizing Hispanic Heritage Month
item.description: As you may know, Hispanic Heritage Month is September 15 through October 15 every year. In honor of the occasion, I wanted to celebrate our Hispanic team members here at Trellix, along with current and prospective candidates as well.

item.title: Securing the Customer Cloud Journey on the AWS Marketplace
item.description: Our team understands the critical role organizations like AWS play in efforts to drive premium threat detection no matter a customer’s security architecture. We continuously look for partners with a similar desire to grow and innovate to relieve pain points for SecOps teams.

item.title: Soulful Work: Diversity in Recruitment and Development
item.description: At Trellix, we are driven to help those who dedicate themselves to cybersecurity – whether they work at Trellix or elsewhere. Trellix is taking concrete steps to increase diversity and foster a culture of soulful work through programs and parternerships that open pathways for traditionally underrepresented communities.

item.title: Ransomware Attacks and Ransom Payments Enabled by Cryptocurrency
item.description: Highlights on the rising threats of ransomware attacks and ransom payments, enabled by cryptocurrency. This blog outlines why this is a concerning trend and how Trellix helps organizations detect, respond to remediate threats to be better prepared.

item.title: Join #TeamTrellix at Black Hat USA 2022
item.description: This blog highlights Trellix’s presence at the 25th annual Black Hat USA 2022 taking place in Las Vegas from August 10 -11.

item.title: CRN® Honors Trellix’s CEO Bryan Palma in 2022 Top 100 Executives List
item.description: CRN®, Computer Reseller News part of the Channel Company, recognized Trellix CEO, Bryan Palma, on this year’s Top 100 Executives list in the Disruptor category.

item.title: Kickin’ It Up at Trellix: We’re Having Fun
item.description: At Trellix, we are passionate about our work. We are excited about our future as the leader in XDR. And we believe work should be fun, as often as practically possible.

item.title: NDAA'S Cybersecurity Scholarship For Service: A Step in the Right Direction
item.description: We believe that cybersecurity is, without a doubt, the United States' most important line of defense.

item.title: Celebrating Trellix Interns & the Next Generation of Cybersecurity Leaders
item.description: We’re honored to celebrate more than 100 global interns who joined us this year to learn, develop new skills, challenge themselves and flourish as leaders.

item.title: Celebrating Cybersecurity Education
item.description: One of the reasons I think Trellix is different is that we are optimistic, confident and even a bit impatient about how we want to shape tomorrow. You’ll see that in everything we do.

item.title: Celebrate Independence & Cybersecurity’s Soulful Work
item.description: For many of us who celebrate Independence Day in the U.S., it is barbecue and fireworks time again this week. As I relaxed with my family on July 4th, I found myself thinking about other celebrations of national independence.

item.title: Partner Relationships: We are in this Together
item.description: This is a first in a series of blog posts for the next several months where Channel Chief, Britt Norwood and his team will bring monthly updates, insights and previews into what partners can expect from Trellix and the opportunities available to our partner community leading up the partner program launch in January 2023.

item.title: Zero Care About Zero Days | Trellix
Fighting Supply Chain Threats Is Complicated
I Do Soulful Work
item.description: What will it take to attract a new talent? How can we bridge the gap between the demand and supply for cybersecurity experts? What can we do as allies and champions to foster a more inclusive, fulfilling and productive future?

item.title: Cloud API Services, Apps and Containers Target in 2022 | Trellix
Celebrating Pride Month
item.description: June is widely celebrated as LGBTQ Pride month. Speaking on behalf of our leadership team here at Trellix, this is a milestone that matters to us – a fundamental core value of Trellix is Open.

item.title: Trellix Survey Findings: A Closer Look at the Cyber Talent Gap
item.description: The results of a survey commissioned and release by Trellix this week shows 85% of respondents believe the workforce shortage is impacting their organization’s abilities to secure increasingly complex information systems and networks.

item.title: Cyber Readiness of U.S. State & Local Government
item.description: This blog discusses the cyber readiness of critical infrastructure run by U.S. state and local government (SLG) entities.

item.title: Cyber Readiness of Oil & Gas Sector
item.description: This blog focuses on the report’s findings from the oil and gas sector, which has been increasingly victimized in the U.S. and Europe over the last year by cyber-attacks.

item.title: Cyber Readiness of US Healthcare
item.description: This blog focuses on the cyber readiness of the U.S. healthcare sector, which traditionally lags due to under investment and simple neglect.

item.title: Cyber Readiness in Asia Pacific Region
item.description: This blog focuses on the Asia Pacific results of a survey commissioned by Trellix and conducted by Vanson Bourne in late 2021 for the Trellix Cyber Readiness Report.

item.title: Cyber Readiness in Europe
item.description: Concerns over cyber-warfare activity in Ukraine has rekindled discussion of the cyber readiness of government agencies and critical infrastructure in Europe.

item.title: Nation-State Cyber Threats: Five Questions MSSPs Must Ask Themselves
item.description: With the attack on Kaseya, MSPs are attractive to cybercriminals and from SolarWinds research we know that IT service providers are a growing target of nation-state actors.

item.title: Nation-State Threat Actors & Consumer Protection
item.description: This report looks into how organizations across sectors prepare for and respond to cybersecurity activity from cybercriminals and attacks by governments.

item.title: Cultivating the Next Generation of Cybersecurity Experts
item.description: As cybersecurity threats from nation-state actors grow in volume and sophistication, the worldwide shortage of cybersecurity professionals grows as well.

item.title: Trellix Stands for Peace
item.description: Trellix stands with friends, family, our partners and customers in Ukraine.

item.title: Let’s Celebrate International Women’s Day 365 Times a Year
item.description: Today, we celebrate International Women’s Day, a global day for championing the social, economic, cultural, and political achievements of women.

item.title: Meet the 2022 CRN Channel Chiefs Leaders from Trellix
item.description: In February, CRN, a brand of The Channel Company, recognized three of our finest leaders on the 2022 Channel Chiefs list.

item.title: Digital Transformation Needs a New Name
item.description: It’s time to shift our strategies, mindsets and language from transformation to reinvention. From almost-there to always-on. From static to living.

item.title: Honoring Black History Month
item.description: February kicks off Black History celebrations in the United States and Canada, and continues throughout the year to October in the UK, Ireland, Spain and Germany. In the United States, Black History Month (BHM) is a federally recognized celebration of the contributions African Americans have made and a time to reflect on the continued fight against racial injustice and inequality.

item.title: With Trellix, the Future of Cybersecurity is Now
item.description: Introducing Trellix, redefining cybersecurity with our incredible expertise and portfolio focused on advanced detection, response and remediation.

item.title: Fighting Supply Chain Threats is Complicated
item.description: Regardless of supply chain uncertainties and complications, protection still starts from within when you’re working with multiple partners and levels of security.

item.title: Planting Seeds Today for the Possibilities of Tomorrow
item.description: Our passion will drive better outcomes, achieved by learning and adapting, and then learning and adapting even more.

item.title: Look Alive Out There
item.description: Imagine if security could learn and adapt, be always-on and living, and act as a catalyst for growth instead of a hinderance keeping us awake at night?

item.title: Celebrating Pride Month: Embracing Inclusivity in Cybersecurity
item.description: Hear from some of the Trellix Pride Voice employee resource group on what Pride Month means to them.

item.title: ChatGPT Integration with OpenDXL
item.description: In this blog post we'll guide you through the OpenDXL Python Client installation and two different OpenDXL integrations using OpenAI's ChatGPT.

item.title: CISOs: Cyber Criminals Don’t Want You to Know This One Weird Trick to Alleviate Insider Threat Nightmares
item.description: Threats from malicious insiders can be particularly hard to disrupt. Learn about the steps in the insider threat kill chain, and detailed counter measures you can take to protect your organization.
